payload.text: Running draft intake to classify scope and find blocking questions.
Draft intake classified this as task with 1 blocking question.

questions.question:
Which first migration slice should this task require: board + ticket detail + floating ticket input, or only the shared component/query foundation with one small example usage?

Why it matters: A task-sized ticket cannot safely centralize every component and replace every IPC call across the entire renderer; the draft needs a concrete completion boundary.
Recommended answer: Migrate the board, ticket detail modal, and floating ticket input enough to prove the shared components and TanStack Query IPC hooks in real production surfaces, leaving full-app rollout follow-ups.
